title: Extracting Relevant Sections from Meeting Minutes
scenario: A user has a meeting transcript and wants to extract the key sections such as introduction, agenda, action items, and conclusion. The target artifact should be a JSON object with these relevant sections. The user wants to keep the original formatting and preserve the speaker names.
constraints: Must be able to handle multiple speaker names

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output preserves the original formatting and speaker names
Check if the output extracts the correct sections (introduction, agenda, action items, conclusion)
Check if the output length is within the specified limit (500 characters)
